task_description: Restructure Augur into a pip-installable package (augur-agents) with CLI entry point, MCP Server, and backward compatibility shims. Phase 1 of the Augur restructuring.

verification.summary: pip install -e . succeeds, augur CLI works (--help, list-personas, analyze, consensus all verified), 41 tests pass, backward compatibility imports work (scanner.personas.* still importable), 17 agents load correctly.
